name: ReimbursementAction
title: Reimbursement Action Code (2.8.1 - 1.0.0)
description: Code specifying the action to be taken during reimbursement calculations.  In the US, this field is defined by CMS or other regulatory agencies.   Used in HL7 Version 2.x messaging in the GP2 segment.

property.description: version when was this code introduced
version when was this code deprecated
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired
A string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept

concept.display: OCE line item denial or rejection is not ignored
concept.definition: OCE line item denial or rejection is not ignored

concept.display: OCE line item denial or rejection is ignored
concept.definition: OCE line item denial or rejection is ignored

concept.display: External line item denial. Line item is denied even if no OCE edits
concept.definition: External line item denial. Line item is denied even if no OCE edits

concept.display: External line item rejection. Line item is rejected even if no OCE edits
concept.definition: External line item rejection. Line item is rejected even if no OCE edits
